theorem:  insertionsort_correct
sample:   3
attempt:  fix_4

[proof]
intro l
induction l with
| nil =>
  constructor
  · simp [insertionsort, Sorted.nil]
  · exact lemma_hint_21
| cons x xs ih =>
  rcases ih with ⟨hs, hp⟩
  constructor
  ·
    have hins : ∀ ys, Sorted ys → Sorted (insert_ x ys) := by
      intro ys
      induction ys with
      | nil =>
        intro hs'
        simp [insert_]
        exact Sorted.singleton
      | cons y ys ihys =>
        intro hs'
        cases ys with
        | nil =>
          simp [insert_]
          by_cases h : x < y
          · simp [h]
            exact Sorted.cons Sorted.singleton (by
              intro hyx
              exact (lt_irrefl x) (lt_trans h hyx))
          · simp [h]
            exact Sorted.cons Sorted.singleton h
        | cons z zs =>
          have htail : Sorted (z :: zs) := lemma_hint_34 y z zs hs'
          have hrec : Sorted (insert_ x (z :: zs)) := ihys htail
          by_cases h : x < y
          · simpa [insert_] using lemma_hint_20 x y (z :: zs) ihys hs' h
          · simpa [insert_, h] using lemma_hint_25 x y z zs hs' hrec
    simpa [insertionsort] using hins (insertionsort xs) hs
  · exact lemma_hint_3 x xs

[lean error]
location:
                · simpa [insert_] using lemma_hint_20 x y (z :: zs) ihys hs' h
                · simpa [insert_, h] using lemma_hint_25 x y z zs hs' hrec
                                                                     ^
          simpa [insertionsort] using hins (insertionsort xs) hs
error: Application type mismatch: The argument
  hrec
has type
  Sorted (insert_ x (z :: zs))
but is expected to have type
  Sorted (z :: insert_ x zs)
in the application
  lemma_hint_25 x y z zs hs' hrec
